title: Supporting files for Jedličková et al, 2024 "Genome editing in almond: A CRISPR-based approach through hairy root transformation"
author: Robert, Helene
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Supporting files for Jedličková et al, 2024 comprising ab1 files of CRISPR-edited sequences of ERF47 and GAI in Prunus dulcis for: ERF74, E-CP1 at the locus targeted by gRNA2, in hairy root 1 ERF74, E-CP6 at the locus targeted by gRNA2, in hairy root 1 ERF74, E-CP6 at the locus targeted by gRNA2, in hairy root 2 GAI, G-CP4 at the locus targeted by gRNA2, in hairy root 1 GAI, G-CP5 at the locus targeted by gRNA2, in hairy root 1 from PCR product cloned in pGEM-T, colony 1 GAI, G-CP5 at the locus targeted by gRNA2, in hairy root 1 from PCR product cloned in pGEM-T, colony 2 sequences of the regions containing the guide RNAs in Vairo cultivar CP, composite plant
